store.name: Phil's Apps
store.tagline: Accessibility tools, finance trackers, and small web experiments by Philip Brocoum.

apps.name: My Net Worth
apps.subtitle: All your stocks, ETFs, crypto wallets, 401(k), on one page
apps.description: See stocks, ETFs, crypto wallets, retirement accounts, and debt on one page with hourly price updates and no account connections.
apps.longDescription: My Net Worth was built to put Fidelity 401(k)s, Vanguard investments, E-Trade and IBKR stocks, bank accounts, and crypto wallets on one page. It is intentionally simple and safe: nothing connects directly to your accounts, and live prices refresh hourly so you can track your full portfolio across TradFi and DeFi in one place.
apps.requirements: Chrome on Windows, Mac, Linux, iPhone, and Android.
features: Track traditional and crypto assets together on one page
Support Yahoo Finance symbols plus Bitcoin, Ethereum and EVM wallets, and Solana wallets
Keep accounts disconnected while prices refresh hourly

apps.name: PhilNav
apps.subtitle: Infrared head mouse for hands-free computer control
apps.description: Control your computer hands-free with a reflective sticker and a Raspberry Pi-powered infrared head mouse running at 75 FPS.
apps.longDescription: PhilNav is a custom infrared head mouse that lets you move the cursor hands-free by tracking a reflective sticker on your head. The software is open source on GitHub, and this listing points to the assembled Gumroad hardware package built by Philip Brocoum for accessibility-focused computing.
apps.requirements: Raspberry Pi hardware on the server side plus a Windows, Mac, or Linux client machine.
features: Hands-free cursor movement using infrared head tracking
Runs at 75 FPS with low-latency mouse control
Cross-platform client support for Windows, macOS, and Linux

apps.name: Tater Talk
apps.subtitle: The simplest speech-to-text dictation web-app on Win/Mac/Nix
apps.description: The easiest way to talk to your computer on Win, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android, and the browser with optional bring-your-own premium speech models.
apps.longDescription: Tater Talk is a browser-based dictation app built to make talking to your computer feel simple across Windows, macOS, Linux, iPhone, Android, and the web. The current version adds a polished redesign and bring-your-own API key support for premium speech-to-text providers such as Microsoft Azure and AssemblyAI.
apps.requirements: Chrome on Windows, Mac, Linux, iPhone, and Android.
features: Works across Win, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android, and desktop browsers
Supports bring-your-own API keys for premium speech-to-text models

apps.name: Poker Tracker
apps.subtitle: Track your live poker PnL with a simple web app
apps.longDescription: Poker Tracker is a lightweight web app for tracking live poker winnings and losses over time. It focuses on fast entry and clear bankroll visibility without the overhead of a larger gambling analytics platform.
apps.requirements: Web browser on desktop or mobile.
features: Track poker winnings and losses in the browser
Keep a running PnL history for live play
Simple interface built for personal bankroll tracking

apps.name: Munch
apps.subtitle: Can you beat the computer at the game of Munch?
apps.description: Play the classic poison-apple strategy game in your browser and try to avoid the losing move.
apps.longDescription: Munch is a browser game where players take turns eating apples from a grid, and whoever is forced to eat the poison apple loses. This version pits you against a computer opponent built around a solved strategy for the 5x6 board.
apps.requirements: Web browser on desktop or mobile.
features: Play Munch instantly in the browser
Challenge a computer opponent using winning board states
Learn the poison-apple rules through live play
